title: Golf Dogleg
body: The 18th hole at Pebble Beach Golf Course is a dogleg to the left of length $$496.0$$ $$m$$. The fairway off the tee is taken to be the $$x$$ direction. A golfer hits his tee shot a distance of $$300.0$$ $$m$$, corresponding to a displacement $$\Delta\vec{r}_1=300.0\hat{i}$$ $$m$$, and hits his second shot $$189.0$$ $$m$$ with a displacement $$\Delta\vec{r}_2=172.0\hat{i}+80.3\hat{j}$$ $$m$$.
lesson: 4. Motion in Two and Three Dimensions
